title: Trump trial, Day 17: Michael Cohen returns as star witness in case
shortDescription: Follow along to the latest updates as Michael Cohen continues testifying in Donald Trump's New York hush money trial.

title: How Ohio Sen. JD Vance landed on Trump shortlist for VP
shortDescription: A Cincinnati-area fundraiser on Wednesday could serve as Ohio Sen. JD Vance's audition for vice president.

title: Biden slaps China with huge tariff hike on electric vehicles, other goods
shortDescription: The higher tariffs, which have already drawn criticism from China, come as Biden is courting support of working-class voters in the 2024 election.

title: Alaska lawmakers pass bill segregating sports teams by 'sex at birth'
shortDescription: Emotions are high as Alaskan House legislators argued for more than 17 hours on what critics say is a hurtful and discriminatory bill.

title: Biden reaches a turning point on Israel. His next move could be big
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's pause of an arms shipment and a State Department report on Israel's conduct in Gaza are a turning point for the Democrat.

title: No, Clinton didn't grant 'illegal immigrants' right to vote | Fact check
shortDescription: The law signed by Clinton forbids people who immigrated illegally from voting. Noncitizens can't vote in federal, state or most local elections.

title: Listen in: Trump allegedly talks hush money in secret recording
shortDescription: Michael Cohen secretly recorded his then-boss Donald Trump as they discussed payoffs before the 2016 presidential election.

title: RFK Jr says that he will appear on the Texas ballot, five other states
shortDescription: Independent presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr. says that he will appear on Texas ballot, along with five other states.

title: What happened at Trump's New Jersey rally?
shortDescription: From his greatest hits to a strange riff on Hannibal Lecter, Trump's NJ rally has something for everyone.

title: 'Women will hate me': Michael Cohen testifies on Trump reaction to Stormy
shortDescription: Michael Cohen took the stand Monday morning. He testified Donald Trump was worried about his reputation, not Melania, if Stormy Daniels went public.

title: Is Michael Cohen testifying in Trump's trial today?
shortDescription: Trump's former personal attorney takes the stand against his former boss.

title: How many 'Never Trumpers' say they're not voting for President Biden?
shortDescription: Some GOP critics of former President Donald Trump say they'll vote for Joe Biden. But most have doubled down on supporting the presumptive nominee

title: Trump rallies have been held during breaks in hush money trial | Fact check
shortDescription: Trump has been at the Manhattan courthouse every day there have been proceedings in the case, which started with jury selection on April 15.

title: MTG criticized Trump trial judge, this post wasn't hers | Fact check
shortDescription: Greene's spokesperson said the parody account that posted the statement on Trump's trial is unaffiliated with the congresswoman.

title: Former Trump fixer on the witness stand: Who is Michael Cohen?
shortDescription: Michael Cohen takes the stand in Donald Trump's hush money trial. Here is what to know about Cohen's prior convictions, lies and prison sentence.

title: GOP ups pressure over expected RNC protest area at Pere Marquette Park
shortDescription: U.S. Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell in a letter said a protest area at the park "may be creating a likely—and preventable—area of conflict."

title: UN cuts estimates of women, children deaths in Gaza war in half
shortDescription: The United Nations reduced by half the number of women and children estimated to have been killed during Israel's war in Gaza.
